rationale: Review 1 additionally catches the AffineAlgGroup bundling violation (finiteType + geomReduced fused into one class, diff lines 34-37) and prescribes a concrete fix, while Review 2 treats AffineAlgGroup as salvageable Layer-0 material without flagging this internal design issue — meaning following Review 2 would preserve a flawed class in the resulting Layer-0 PR.
